data.content: Plan needs revision: alias propagation is not fully specified for the waves path or dependency rendering. Add alias to the public Beat/WaveBeat data contracts, map it in /api/waves/route.ts, decide how DepTree resolves linked-beat aliases without a beat lookup today (for example via enriched dependency data or an explicit lookup map/prop), and expand tests beyond toBeat() to cover waves payload/rendering plus dependency alias fallback behavior.
